title: Mark Warner is up and Running!
markdown:
Here is the Mark Warner for Senate [contribution page](http://www.actblue.com/entity/fundraisers/18420).  Here is [campaign website](http://www.markwarner2008.com/). Not much there yet except a video.


Actblue.com is the transaction processor, so you can use your credit card and the processing fee is optional.


Bumper stickers as soon as I find out out where to get them.
